title: synaedrys cornea
intro: Synaedrys cornea, also known as the Alder Buckthorn or Alder Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cornaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthraquinone compounds, which have been shown to have laxative and purgative effects. The health benefits of Synaedrys cornea include treating constipation, diarrhea, and certain skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Synaedrys cornea is often used as a decoction or tincture, and can also be found in combination with other herbs in supplements and teas.
